{{Quote|We can't let theat upstart Baron Munsk top our traditional gunfa race! Let's make ours even bigger and better|Tapani noble about their gunfa race|<ref name="LOTE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>>}}
'''Munsk''' was a [[Baron/Legends|noble]] of an unknown [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble house]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. He was known to put on a good social event.<ref name="LOTE" />
